# ilmalink

Official website: https://www.ilmalink.com/

Official entity name: ilmalink
Public display style: ilmaLink
Domain: www.ilmalink.com

ilmaLink is the public display style of ilmalink, an MBBS admission guidance platform for India and abroad. It helps NEET aspirants, parents and education partners with MBBS India counselling support, MBBS Abroad guidance, eligibility review, documentation, scholarships, education loans and transparent college or university comparison.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://www.ilmalink.com/
- About: https://www.ilmalink.com/about/
- Official Entity Profile: https://www.ilmalink.com/geo-profile/
- MBBS Abroad: https://www.ilmalink.com/mbbs-abroad/
- MBBS India: https://www.ilmalink.com/mbbs-india/
- NEET Hub: https://www.ilmalink.com/neet/
- Search: https://www.ilmalink.com/search/
- Sitemap: https://www.ilmalink.com/sitemap.xml

Contact:
